content:
I have compiled the requested list of exactly 10 highly valuable and practical hidden gem repositories based on the user's specific goals (writing a fantasy novel and generating automated revenue). Due to a permission error restricting direct web access, I leveraged extensive internal knowledge to deliver this curated, high-quality list. 

Here are the 10 repositories to pass back to the user:

### Fantasy Novel Writing

1. **vkbo/novelWriter**
- **URL:** https://github.com/vkbo/novelWriter
- **Description:** An open-source, markdown-like text editor designed for writing novels and larger projects consisting of many smaller documents.
- **Why it’s incredibly useful:** It provides a lightweight, FOSS alternative to Scrivener. For a fantasy author, it allows building complex story bibles, interlinking locations, characters, and plot points via metadata, and keeping your massive world-building lore organized in plain text without bloat.

2. **SillyTavern/SillyTavern**
- **URL:** https://github.com/SillyTavern/SillyTavern
- **Description:** An advanced, customizable web UI for interacting with local or cloud-based text generation AI models, primarily focused on character roleplay.
- **Why it’s incredibly useful:** You can create detailed "character cards" for your protagonist, antagonist, and side characters. By having organic text conversations with your own characters, you can easily develop distinct voices, uncover plot holes, test out dialogue, and deeply understand their motivations before writing them into the manuscript.

3. **steven-tey/novel**
- **URL:** https://github.com/steven-tey/novel
- **Description:** An open-source, Notion-style WYSIWYG editor featuring AI-powered autocompletion.
- **Why it’s incredibly useful:** It provides a seamless interface to self-host an AI writing assistant. While drafting your fantasy novel, you can simply type "//" or press tab to have the AI continue the scene, elaborate on a spell's visual effects, or overcome writer's block, all within a distraction-free environment.

4. **oobabooga/text-generation-webui**
- **URL:** https://github.com/oobabooga/text-generation-webui
- **Description:** A highly extensible Gradio web interface for running Large Language Models locally. 
- **Why it’s incredibly useful:** It allows authors to run uncensored, locally-hosted LLMs (like Llama 3 or Mistral) without cloud API restrictions or content filters, which is crucial when writing gritty, dark fantasy or violent action scenes that commercial models often refuse to generate.

5. **silentvoid13/Templater**
- **URL:** https://github.com/silentvoid13/Templater
- **Description:** A powerful plugin for Obsidian that allows users to insert variables and functions into notes to create dynamic templates using JavaScript.
- **Why it’s incredibly useful:** Obsidian is heavily used by writers; Templater turns a static vault into an automated world-building engine. You can write scripts that instantly generate a randomized fantasy city layout, roll stats for factions, or automatically link new character profiles to your timeline.

---

### Revenue Generation and Growth Hacking

6. **n8n-io/n8n**
- **URL:** https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n
- **Description:** A free, source-available, self-hosted workflow automation tool with hundreds of integrations.
- **Why it’s incredibly useful:** It acts as the backbone of passive revenue streams. You can construct powerful workflows that connect to OpenAI, WordPress, and Stripe—for instance, automatically generating niche SEO blog content, inserting affiliate links, and auto-publishing it across social channels every day with zero manual input.

7. **browser-use/browser-use**
- **URL:** https://github.com/browser-use/browser-use
- **Description:** A library that allows AI agents to autonomously operate web browsers in a human-like way.
- **Why it’s incredibly useful:** Growth hackers can script AI to automatically surf the web to engage with audiences on Reddit or Quora, answer niche questions with high-quality AI text, and naturally drop affiliate links, replicating a human social media marketer working 24/7.

8. **mendableai/firecrawl**
- **URL:** https://github.com/mendableai/firecrawl
- **Description:** An API service/tool that turns entire websites into clean, LLM-ready markdown formats.
- **Why it’s incredibly useful:** Perfect for SEO automation and niche site building. You can use it to instantly scrape successful competitor blogs, pipe the markdown into an LLM to extract the semantic structure or rewrite it better, and rapidly generate high-ranking content networks.

9. **apify/crawlee**
- **URL:** https://github.com/apify/crawlee
- **Description:** A powerful web scraping and browser automation library for Node.js with built-in proxy management and anti-blocking mechanisms.
- **Why it’s incredibly useful:** For aggressive growth hacking, Crawlee allows you to extract millions of leads, scrape eCommerce product prices, or find untapped affiliate niches by reliably bypassing bot protections on massive websites.

10. **geekan/MetaGPT**
- **URL:** https://github.com/geekan/MetaGPT
- **Description:** A multi-agent framework that assigns different corporate roles (Product Manager, Engineer, Marketer) to AI models so they can collaborate on a single task.
- **Why it’s incredibly useful:** You can give it a prompt like "Create a micro-SaaS for fantasy writers," and the framework will autonomously generate the market research, write the marketing copy, outline the SEO strategy, and even write the initial codebase, drastically accelerating your time-to-market and revenue generation.
